paymentReminder.friendly.subject: Friendly reminder: Invoice #{{invoiceNumber}}
paymentReminder.firm.subject: Payment reminder: Invoice #{{invoiceNumber}} — {{days}} days overdue
paymentReminder.final.subject: Final notice: Invoice #{{invoiceNumber}} — {{days}} days past due
paymentReminder.collections.subject: Overdue account: Invoice #{{invoiceNumber}} — immediate attention required
paymentReminder.friendly.fallback:
Hi {{clientName}},

Just a quick reminder that invoice #{{invoiceNumber}} for {{amount}} was due on {{dueDate}}.

If you've already sent payment, please disregard this message. Otherwise, we'd appreciate payment at your earliest convenience.

Thank you for your business.
paymentReminder.firm.fallback:
Hi {{clientName}},

This is a reminder that invoice #{{invoiceNumber}} for {{amount}} is now {{daysOverdue}} days past the due date of {{dueDate}}.

Please arrange payment at your earliest convenience. If you have any questions about this invoice, please don't hesitate to reach out.

Thank you.
paymentReminder.final.fallback:
{{clientName}},

This is a final notice regarding invoice #{{invoiceNumber}} for {{amount}}, which was due on {{dueDate}} — now {{daysOverdue}} days overdue.

We need to receive payment within the next 7 business days to avoid further action on this account.

If there are extenuating circumstances, please contact us immediately so we can discuss options.

Regards
paymentReminder.collections.fallback:
{{clientName}},

Invoice #{{invoiceNumber}} for {{amount}} has been overdue for {{daysOverdue}} days (original due date: {{dueDate}}).

This account has been flagged for review. Immediate payment is required to resolve this matter.

Please remit payment or contact us within 48 hours to discuss a resolution.

Regards
paymentReminder.notification.title: Payment reminder sent
appointmentConfirmation.subject: Confirming your appointment on {{date}}
appointmentConfirmation.fallback:
Hi {{clientName}},

We're writing to confirm your appointment for "{{taskTitle}}" on {{date}}.

Please reply to confirm or let us know if you need to reschedule.

Thank you.
dayBeforeReminder.subject: Reminder: Your appointment is tomorrow
dayBeforeReminder.fallback:
Hi {{clientName}},

Just a quick reminder — we're scheduled to visit tomorrow, {{date}}, for "{{taskTitle}}".

Please let us know if anything has changed.

Thank you.
scheduleChanged.subject: Update on your scheduled visit
scheduleChanged.fallback:
Hi {{clientName}},

We wanted to let you know that "{{taskTitle}}" has been rescheduled to {{newDate}}.

Please reply if this doesn't work for you and we'll find a better time.

Thank you for your flexibility.
rescheduleRequest.subject: Re: Rescheduling "{{taskTitle}}"
rescheduleRequest.fallback:
Hi {{clientName}},

Thanks for letting us know you need to reschedule. We'll follow up shortly with a new time.

Thank you.
subcontractorCoordination.subject: Coordination for {{projectTitle}}
subcontractorCoordination.fallback:
Hi {{subcontractorName}},

Reaching out to coordinate your work on "{{projectTitle}}" at {{address}}.

Please confirm your schedule and any requirements.

Thanks.
notification.dayBeforeReminder.title: Reminder drafted
notification.scheduleChanged.title: Schedule change drafted
notification.rescheduleRequest.title: Reschedule request detected
statusEmail.subject: Project Update: {{projectTitle}}
statusEmail.fallback:
Hi {{clientName}},

I wanted to give you a quick update on your project "{{projectTitle}}".

{{progressLine}}

Please let me know if you have any questions.

Best regards
statusEmail.progress.tasksCompletedSingu: {{count}} task has been completed since our last update.
statusEmail.progress.tasksCompletedPlura: {{count}} tasks have been completed since our last update.
invoiceCover.fallback:
Hi {{clientName}},

Please find attached invoice #{{invoiceNumber}} for {{amount}} for "{{projectTitle}}".

Payment is due by {{dueDate}}.

Thank you for your business.
invoiceCover.subject: Invoice #{{invoiceNumber}} for {{projectTitle}}
